attributes.description: Detect and inventory Shadow AI tools on Windows endpoints — local LLMs, AI coding agents, AI desktop applications, MCP servers (with config content scanning), AI model files, Python/npm AI packages, browser extensions, Docker containers, Windows services, scheduled tasks, GPU-equipped systems, AI API key exposure, and AI tool configuration directories.
attributes.name: ai-asset-discovery-windows

queries.query:
-- Running LLM Runtime Detection
-- Identifies local LLM servers, inference engines, and AI model serving processes
-- Covers: Ollama, LM Studio, llama.cpp, vLLM, GPT4All, Jan, LocalAI, KoboldCpp,
-- text-generation-webui, Open WebUI, AnythingLLM, LiteLLM, llamafile, MLC LLM, ComfyUI
SELECT
    p.name,
    p.path,
    p.cmdline,
    p.pid,
    u.username,
    p.resident_size,
    datetime(p.start_time, 'unixepoch') AS start_time,
    p.parent AS ppid
FROM processes p
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.uid = u.uid
WHERE p.name IN (
    'ollama', 'ollama.exe', 'lms', 'lms.exe',
    'gpt4all', 'gpt4all.exe', 'jan', 'jan.exe',
    'msty', 'msty.exe', 'local-ai', 'local-ai.exe',
    'koboldcpp', 'koboldcpp.exe', 'llama-server', 'llama-server.exe',
    'llama-cli', 'llama-cli.exe', 'vllm', 'vllm.exe',
    'mlc_llm', 'mlc_llm.exe', 'mlc_chat', 'mlc_chat.exe',
    'anythingllm', 'anythingllm.exe', 'anything-llm', 'anything-llm.exe',
    'litellm', 'litellm.exe', 'open-webui', 'open-webui.exe',
    'llamafile', 'llamafile.exe',
    'text-generation-launcher', 'text-generation-launcher.exe',
    'text-generation-router', 'text-generation-router.exe',
    'comfyui', 'comfyui.exe', 'invokeai', 'invokeai.exe'
,
    'msty',
    'msty.exe',
    'Msty.exe',
    'exo',
    'exo.exe',
    'tabby',
    'tabby.exe')
    -- Path-based detection for Windows tray apps (e.g., Ollama.exe with capital O)
    OR p.path LIKE '%\\Ollama\\%'
    OR p.path LIKE '%\\LM Studio\\%'
    OR p.path LIKE '%\\GPT4All\\%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%ollama serve%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%vllm.entrypoints%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%text-generation-launcher%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%koboldcpp%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%llama-server%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%llama.cpp%server%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%llamafile%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%mlc_llm%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%litellm%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%open-webui%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%anythingllm%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%localai%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%text-generation-webui%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%oobabooga%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%comfyui%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%invokeai%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%stable-diffusion-webui%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%whisper%server%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%msty%serve%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%exo%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%tabby%serve%'
;

-- Running AI Coding Agent Processes
-- Detects AI coding assistants, agents, and AI-powered terminals
-- These tools can read/write files, execute code, and interact with internal systems
-- Covers: Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Copilot, Aider, Cline, Roo Code,
-- Continue, Codeium, Tabnine, Amazon Q, Sourcegraph Cody, Codex, Warp, Zed,
-- Pieces, ShellGPT, OpenHands, Supermaven
SELECT
    p.name,
    p.path,
    p.cmdline,
    p.pid,
    u.username,
    p.resident_size,
    datetime(p.start_time, 'unixepoch') AS start_time,
    p.parent AS ppid
FROM processes p
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.uid = u.uid
WHERE p.name IN (
    'claude', 'claude.exe', 'cursor', 'cursor.exe',
    'windsurf', 'windsurf.exe', 'warp', 'warp.exe',
    'zed', 'zed.exe', 'tabnine', 'tabnine.exe',
    'TabNine', 'TabNine.exe', 'WasmTabNine', 'WasmTabNine.exe',
    'codeium_language_server', 'codeium_language_server.exe',
    'supermaven', 'supermaven.exe',
    'amazon-q', 'amazon-q.exe', 'pieces-os', 'pieces-os.exe',
    'Pieces OS', 'Pieces OS.exe',
    'codex', 'codex.exe', 'aider', 'aider.exe',
    'sgpt', 'sgpt.exe'
,
    'augment',
    'augment.exe',
    'codex',
    'codex.exe',
    'goose',
    'goose.exe',
    'devin',
    'devin.exe',
    'amp',
    'amp.exe')
    -- Claude Code / Claude Desktop
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%claude-code%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%@anthropic/claude-code%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%@anthropic-ai/claude-code%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%claude_desktop%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%com.anthropic.claudedesktop%'
    -- Cursor
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%Cursor.app%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%Cursor Helper%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%cursor-retrieval%'
    -- Windsurf / Codeium
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%Windsurf%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%codeium_language_server%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%codeium%enterprise%'
    -- GitHub Copilot
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%github.copilot%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%copilot-agent%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%copilot-language-server%'
    -- OpenAI Codex CLI
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%@openai/codex%'
    -- Aider
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%aider-chat%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%aider%--model%'
    -- Cline / Roo Code (VS Code extensions spawn node)
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%saoudrizwan.claude-dev%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%rooveterinaryinc.roo-cline%'
    -- Continue.dev
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%continue.continue%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%continuedev%'
    -- Amazon Q / CodeWhisperer
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%amazon-q%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%codewhisperer%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%AmazonWebServices.amazon-q%'
    -- Sourcegraph Cody
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%sourcegraph.cody%'
    -- Tabnine
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%tabnine%'
    -- Warp terminal (has AI built in)
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%dev.warp.Warp%'
    -- Zed editor (has AI built in)
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%dev.zed.Zed%'
    -- ShellGPT
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%shell_gpt%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%shell-gpt%'
    -- OpenHands / SWE-agent
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%openhands%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%swe-agent%'
    -- Pieces
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%pieces-os%'
    -- Supermaven
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%supermaven%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%augment%code%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%openai/codex%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%goose%session%'
;

-- AI API Servers Exposed on Network
-- Detects AI services listening on non-loopback addresses (network-exposed)
-- Ports: 11434 Ollama, 1234/43411 LM Studio, 4891 GPT4All, 1337 Jan,
-- 5001 KoboldCpp, 7860 Gradio/HF, 8080 llama.cpp/LocalAI/TGI,
-- 8000 vLLM, 4000 LiteLLM, 3000 Open WebUI, 3001 AnythingLLM,
-- 8188 ComfyUI, 9090 InvokeAI, 1000 Pieces
SELECT
    l.port,
    l.address,
    l.protocol,
    p.name,
    p.path,
    p.cmdline,
    p.pid
FROM listening_ports l
JOIN processes p ON l.pid = p.pid
WHERE l.port IN (
    11434, 1234, 43411, 4891, 1337, 5001, 7860,
    8080, 8000, 4000, 3000, 3001, 8188, 9090, 1000
)
    AND l.address != '127.0.0.1'
    AND l.address != '::1';

-- AI API Servers Inventory (Including Localhost)
-- Inventories ALL AI services on known ports, including loopback
-- Complements ai_listening_ports which only flags network-exposed servers
SELECT
    l.port,
    l.address,
    l.protocol,
    p.name,
    p.path,
    p.cmdline,
    p.pid
FROM listening_ports l
JOIN processes p ON l.pid = p.pid
WHERE l.port IN (
    11434, 1234, 43411, 4891, 1337, 5001, 7860,
    8080, 8000, 4000, 3000, 3001, 8188, 9090, 1000
);

-- Installed AI Applications (Windows)
-- Detects AI desktop applications, coding tools, and productivity tools
SELECT
    name,
    version,
    install_location,
    publisher,
    install_date
FROM programs
WHERE name LIKE '%Ollama%' OR name LIKE '%LM Studio%' OR name LIKE '%ChatGPT%'
    OR name LIKE '%Claude%' OR name LIKE '%Cursor%' OR name LIKE '%GPT4All%'
    OR name LIKE '%Perplexity%' OR name LIKE '%Windsurf%' OR name LIKE '%DeepSeek%'
    OR name LIKE '%Copilot%' OR name LIKE '%Jan%' OR name LIKE '%Msty%'
    OR name LIKE '%AnythingLLM%' OR name LIKE '%Open WebUI%'
    OR name LIKE '%Warp%' OR name LIKE '%Zed%' OR name LIKE '%Poe%'
    OR name LIKE '%Amazon Q%' OR name LIKE '%Pieces%'
    OR name LIKE '%Codeium%' OR name LIKE '%Tabnine%'
    OR name LIKE '%DiffusionBee%' OR name LIKE '%ComfyUI%'
    OR name LIKE '%LiteLLM%' OR name LIKE '%Notion%';

-- Running MCP Server Processes
-- Detects Model Context Protocol servers bridging AI tools to local resources
-- MCP servers provide filesystem, database, and API access to AI assistants
SELECT
    p.name,
    p.path,
    p.cmdline,
    p.pid,
    u.username,
    datetime(p.start_time, 'unixepoch') AS start_time
FROM processes p
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.uid = u.uid
WHERE p.cmdline LIKE '%@modelcontextprotocol/%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%mcp-server-%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%mcp_server%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%fastmcp%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%modelcontextprotocol%';

-- MCP Configuration Files (Windows)
-- Detects MCP config files for Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Cursor, and VS Code
SELECT
    path,
    size,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time,
    datetime(atime, 'unixepoch') AS accessed_time
FROM file
WHERE path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Roaming\Claude\claude_desktop_config.json'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.claude.json'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.claude\settings.json'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.cursor\mcp.json'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.vscode\mcp.json'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.mcp.json';

-- AI Model Files (Windows)
-- Detects large model files (>100MB) in known AI model storage directories
SELECT
    path,
    filename,
    size,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time,
    datetime(atime, 'unixepoch') AS accessed_time
FROM file
WHERE (
    path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.ollama\models\blobs\%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.lmstudio\models\%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.cache\huggingface\hub\%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.cache\llama.cpp\%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\nomic.ai\GPT4All\%'
)
AND size > 100000000;

-- AI Model Files by Extension (Windows)
-- Detects model weight files by extension in user directories
-- NOTE: osquery file table '%' matches one directory level, so we need
-- both shallow paths (user home) and known deep paths for full coverage
SELECT
    path,
    filename,
    size,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time
FROM file
WHERE (
    -- Shallow: files directly in user home or one level down
    path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\%.gguf'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\%.safetensors'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\%.llamafile'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\%.ggml'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\%.onnx'
    -- Deep: known model directories (recursive via %\%)
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.ollama\models\%\%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.lmstudio\models\%\%\%\%.gguf'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.cache\huggingface\hub\%\%\%\%.safetensors'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.cache\llama.cpp\%.gguf'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\nomic.ai\GPT4All\%.gguf'
    -- Downloads folder (common drop location)
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\Downloads\%.gguf'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\Downloads\%.safetensors'
)
AND size > 100000000;

-- AI/ML Python Packages (Windows)
-- Detects installed AI frameworks by scanning Python site-packages directories
-- NOTE: The python_packages table is not available on Windows.
-- This query scans common Python installation paths for AI package directories.
SELECT
    f.filename AS name,
    f.path,
    f.directory,
    datetime(f.mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time
FROM file f
WHERE (
    f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\%\Lib\site-packages\torch\%'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\%\Lib\site-packages\tensorflow\%'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\%\Lib\site-packages\onnxruntime\%'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\%\Lib\site-packages\jax\%'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\%\Lib\site-packages\transformers\%'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\%\Lib\site-packages\diffusers\%'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\%\Lib\site-packages\accelerate\%'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\%\Lib\site-packages\huggingface_hub\%'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\%\Lib\site-packages\openai\%'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\%\Lib\site-packages\anthropic\%'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\%\Lib\site-packages\langchain\%'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\%\Lib\site-packages\langchain_core\%'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\%\Lib\site-packages\llama_index\%'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\%\Lib\site-packages\autogen\%'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\%\Lib\site-packages\crewai\%'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\%\Lib\site-packages\vllm\%'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\%\Lib\site-packages\llama_cpp\%'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\%\Lib\site-packages\chromadb\%'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\%\Lib\site-packages\fastmcp\%'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\%\Lib\site-packages\mcp\%'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\%\Lib\site-packages\groq\%'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\%\Lib\site-packages\cohere\%'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\%\Lib\site-packages\mistralai\%'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\%\Lib\site-packages\together\%'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\%\Lib\site-packages\replicate\%'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\%\Lib\site-packages\aider\%'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\%\Lib\site-packages\shell_gpt\%'
    -- Also scan conda environments
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\anaconda3\Lib\site-packages\torch\%'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\anaconda3\Lib\site-packages\tensorflow\%'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\anaconda3\Lib\site-packages\transformers\%'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\anaconda3\Lib\site-packages\openai\%'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\anaconda3\Lib\site-packages\anthropic\%'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\anaconda3\Lib\site-packages\langchain\%'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\miniconda3\Lib\site-packages\torch\%'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\miniconda3\Lib\site-packages\tensorflow\%'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\miniconda3\Lib\site-packages\transformers\%'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\miniconda3\Lib\site-packages\openai\%'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\miniconda3\Lib\site-packages\anthropic\%'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\miniconda3\Lib\site-packages\langchain\%'
)
AND f.filename = '__init__.py'
AND f.type = 'regular';

-- AI Browser Extensions (Chrome/Chromium/Edge)
-- Detects AI-related browser extensions for chat, coding, writing, and search
SELECT
    ce.name,
    ce.identifier,
    ce.version,
    ce.description,
    ce.path,
    u.username
FROM chrome_extensions ce
LEFT JOIN users u ON ce.uid = u.uid
WHERE
    -- AI assistants & chat
    ce.name LIKE '%Copilot%' OR ce.name LIKE '%ChatGPT%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Claude%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Gemini%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Perplexity%' OR ce.name LIKE '%DeepSeek%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Monica%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Merlin%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Sider%' OR ce.name LIKE '%MaxAI%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%UseChatGPT%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Poe%'
    -- AI coding
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Cody%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Codeium%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Tabnine%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Blackbox%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Phind%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Bito%'
    -- AI writing & productivity
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Grammarly%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Jasper%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Wordtune%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Quillbot%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%QuillBot%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Compose AI%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Writesonic%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Copy.ai%'
    -- AI search & research
    OR ce.name LIKE '%You.com%' OR ce.name LIKE '%AIPRM%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%WebChatGPT%'
    -- AI summarization
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Glasp%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Eightify%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%NoteGPT%' OR ce.name LIKE '%tl;dv%'
    -- AI translation
    OR ce.name LIKE '%DeepL%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Immersive Translate%';

-- AI Docker Containers (Windows-compatible)
-- Detects AI container processes via process table since docker_containers
-- table requires a Unix socket and is not available on Windows.
-- Falls back to detecting docker/podman processes with AI-related image names.
SELECT
    p.name,
    p.path,
    p.cmdline,
    p.pid,
    datetime(p.start_time, 'unixepoch') AS started_at
FROM processes p
WHERE (p.name IN ('docker.exe', 'docker', 'podman.exe', 'podman')
    OR p.path LIKE '%docker%' OR p.path LIKE '%podman%')
    AND (
    -- LLM serving
    p.cmdline LIKE '%ollama%' OR p.cmdline LIKE '%vllm%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%text-generation%' OR p.cmdline LIKE '%localai%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%llama.cpp%' OR p.cmdline LIKE '%litellm%'
    -- ML frameworks
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%pytorch%' OR p.cmdline LIKE '%tensorflow%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%triton%' OR p.cmdline LIKE '%huggingface%'
    -- MCP servers
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%mcp%' OR p.cmdline LIKE '%modelcontextprotocol%'
    -- AI apps
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%open-webui%' OR p.cmdline LIKE '%anythingllm%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%flowise%' OR p.cmdline LIKE '%langflow%'
    -- Vector databases
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%chromadb%' OR p.cmdline LIKE '%chroma%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%qdrant%' OR p.cmdline LIKE '%weaviate%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%milvus%' OR p.cmdline LIKE '%pinecone%'
    -- Image generation
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%comfyui%' OR p.cmdline LIKE '%stable-diffusion%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%invokeai%' OR p.cmdline LIKE '%automatic1111%'
    -- AI workflow/agents
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%n8n%' OR p.cmdline LIKE '%openhands%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%sweepai%' OR p.cmdline LIKE '%pr-agent%'
    );

-- AI Auto-Start Services (Windows)
-- Detects AI tools registered as Windows services
SELECT
    name,
    display_name,
    path,
    start_type,
    status,
    user_account
FROM services
WHERE name LIKE '%ollama%' OR name LIKE '%lmstudio%'
    OR name LIKE '%anythingllm%' OR name LIKE '%litellm%'
    OR name LIKE '%pieces%' OR name LIKE '%comfyui%'
    OR display_name LIKE '%Ollama%' OR display_name LIKE '%LM Studio%'
    OR display_name LIKE '%AnythingLLM%' OR display_name LIKE '%LiteLLM%'
    OR display_name LIKE '%Pieces%'
    OR path LIKE '%ollama%' OR path LIKE '%litellm%'
    OR path LIKE '%llama-server%' OR path LIKE '%anythingllm%';

-- MCP npm Packages (Windows)
-- Detects installed Model Context Protocol npm packages
-- Uses file table to scan for package.json in node_modules because
-- osquery runs as SYSTEM and cannot discover user npm installs
SELECT
    f.directory,
    f.path,
    f.filename
FROM file f
WHERE (
    -- Global npm (Roaming)
    f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Roaming\npm\node_modules\@modelcontextprotocol\%\package.json'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Roaming\npm\node_modules\mcp-server-%\package.json'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Roaming\npm\node_modules\@anthropic-ai\%\package.json'
    -- User home node_modules
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\node_modules\@modelcontextprotocol\%\package.json'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\node_modules\mcp-server-%\package.json'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\node_modules\@anthropic-ai\%\package.json'
    -- Program Files nodejs
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Program Files\nodejs\node_modules\@modelcontextprotocol\%\package.json'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Program Files\nodejs\node_modules\mcp-server-%\package.json'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Program Files\nodejs\node_modules\@anthropic-ai\%\package.json'
    -- NVM for Windows
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Roaming\nvm\%\node_modules\@modelcontextprotocol\%\package.json'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Roaming\nvm\%\node_modules\mcp-server-%\package.json'
    OR f.path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Roaming\nvm\%\node_modules\@anthropic-ai\%\package.json'
);

-- GPU-Equipped Systems (AI Inference Capability) — Windows
-- Detects NVIDIA and AMD GPUs capable of running local LLMs
-- Uses video_info table (Windows-native) instead of pci_devices (unavailable on Windows)
-- GPU presence + AI software = high-confidence shadow AI indicator
SELECT
    model,
    manufacturer AS vendor,
    driver_version AS driver,
    series
FROM video_info
WHERE manufacturer LIKE '%NVIDIA%'
    OR manufacturer LIKE '%Advanced Micro Devices%'
    OR manufacturer LIKE '%AMD%'
    OR model LIKE '%NVIDIA%'
    OR model LIKE '%GeForce%'
    OR model LIKE '%Radeon%'
    OR model LIKE '%RTX%'
    OR model LIKE '%GTX%';

-- AI Browser Extensions (Firefox)
-- Detects AI-related browser extensions installed in Firefox
-- Complements ai_chrome_extensions for full browser coverage
SELECT
    fa.name,
    fa.identifier,
    fa.version,
    fa.description,
    fa.path,
    fa.active,
    u.username
FROM firefox_addons fa
LEFT JOIN users u ON fa.uid = u.uid
WHERE
    -- AI assistants & chat
    fa.name LIKE '%Copilot%' OR fa.name LIKE '%ChatGPT%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Claude%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Gemini%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Perplexity%' OR fa.name LIKE '%DeepSeek%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Monica%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Merlin%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Sider%' OR fa.name LIKE '%MaxAI%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%UseChatGPT%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Poe%'
    -- AI coding
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Cody%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Codeium%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Tabnine%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Blackbox%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Phind%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Bito%'
    -- AI writing & productivity
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Grammarly%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Jasper%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Wordtune%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Quillbot%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%QuillBot%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Compose AI%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Writesonic%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Copy.ai%'
    -- AI search & research
    OR fa.name LIKE '%You.com%' OR fa.name LIKE '%AIPRM%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%WebChatGPT%'
    -- AI summarization
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Glasp%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Eightify%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%NoteGPT%' OR fa.name LIKE '%tl;dv%'
    -- AI translation
    OR fa.name LIKE '%DeepL%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Immersive Translate%';

-- AI API Credential Exposure (Windows)
-- Detects files likely containing AI service API keys and credentials
SELECT
    path,
    size,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time,
    datetime(atime, 'unixepoch') AS accessed_time
FROM file
WHERE (
    path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.env'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.env.local'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\Projects\%\.env'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\src\%\.env'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\code\%\.env'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\repos\%\.env'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.openai'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.anthropic'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.config\openai\auth.json'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.config\anthropic\auth.json'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.config\groq\auth.json'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.config\cohere\auth.json'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.cache\huggingface\token'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.huggingface\token'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.ollama\auth'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\litellm_config.yaml'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.litellm\config.yaml'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.config\shell_gpt\.sgptrc'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.aider.conf.yml'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.aider.env'
)
AND size > 0;

-- Running Jupyter Notebook/Lab Servers
-- Detects Jupyter servers which are common AI development environments
-- Jupyter servers may expose notebooks with sensitive data, model training code,
-- and API credentials to the network
SELECT
    p.name,
    p.path,
    p.cmdline,
    p.pid,
    u.username,
    p.resident_size,
    datetime(p.start_time, 'unixepoch') AS start_time,
    p.parent AS ppid
FROM processes p
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.uid = u.uid
WHERE p.name IN (
    'jupyter', 'jupyter.exe', 'jupyter-lab', 'jupyter-lab.exe',
    'jupyter-notebook', 'jupyter-notebook.exe',
    'jupyter-server', 'jupyter-server.exe',
    'jupyterhub', 'jupyterhub.exe',
    'jupyterhub-singleuser', 'jupyterhub-singleuser.exe'
)
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%jupyter%notebook%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%jupyter%lab%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%jupyter%server%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%jupyterhub%';

-- AI VS Code Extensions (Windows)
-- Detects AI-related VS Code extensions installed on Windows
SELECT
    path,
    filename AS extension_id,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time
FROM file
WHERE (
    path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.vscode\extensions\github.copilot%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.vscode\extensions\github.copilot-chat%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.vscode\extensions\saoudrizwan.claude-dev%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.vscode\extensions\rooveterinaryinc.roo-cline%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.vscode\extensions\continue.continue%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.vscode\extensions\sourcegraph.cody%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.vscode\extensions\codeium.codeium%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.vscode\extensions\tabnine.tabnine%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.vscode\extensions\amazonwebservices.amazon-q%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.vscode\extensions\supermaven.supermaven%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.vscode\extensions\blackboxapp.blackbox%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.vscode\extensions\pieces.pieces-vscode%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.vscode\extensions\phind.phind%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.vscode\extensions\bito.bito%'
)
AND type = 'directory';

-- AI Service DNS Lookups (Windows)
-- Detects DNS resolutions to known AI service domains in the Windows DNS cache
-- Adapted from: dns_cache_snapshot_windows_elastic
-- Catches AI SaaS usage even without installed apps or browser extensions
SELECT
    name AS query_name,
    type AS query_type,
    flags
FROM dns_cache
WHERE (
    -- OpenAI / ChatGPT
    name LIKE '%openai.com'
    OR name LIKE '%chatgpt.com'
    OR name LIKE '%oaiusercontent.com'
    -- Anthropic / Claude
    OR name LIKE '%anthropic.com'
    OR name LIKE '%claude.ai'
    -- Google AI
    OR name LIKE '%generativelanguage.googleapis.com'
    OR name LIKE '%gemini.google.com'
    OR name LIKE '%aistudio.google.com'
    OR name LIKE '%notebooklm.google.com'
    -- Microsoft Copilot
    OR name LIKE '%copilot.microsoft.com'
    OR name LIKE '%copilot.microsoft.com'
    -- Meta AI
    OR name LIKE '%meta.ai'
    OR name LIKE '%llama.meta.com'
    -- Perplexity
    OR name LIKE '%perplexity.ai'
    -- Cohere
    OR name LIKE '%cohere.ai'
    OR name LIKE '%cohere.com'
    -- Mistral
    OR name LIKE '%mistral.ai'
    -- Groq
    OR name LIKE '%groq.com'
    -- Together AI
    OR name LIKE '%together.ai'
    OR name LIKE '%together.xyz'
    -- Fireworks AI
    OR name LIKE '%fireworks.ai'
    -- DeepSeek
    OR name LIKE '%deepseek.com'
    -- HuggingFace
    OR name LIKE '%huggingface.co'
    -- Replicate
    OR name LIKE '%replicate.com'
    -- Cursor
    OR name LIKE '%cursor.sh'
    OR name LIKE '%cursor.com'
    -- Codeium / Windsurf
    OR name LIKE '%codeium.com'
    -- Tabnine
    OR name LIKE '%tabnine.com'
    -- GitHub Copilot
    OR name LIKE '%copilot-proxy.githubusercontent.com'
    OR name LIKE '%githubcopilot.com'
    -- AI image generation
    OR name LIKE '%midjourney.com'
    OR name LIKE '%stability.ai'
    OR name LIKE '%leonardo.ai'
    OR name LIKE '%ideogram.ai'
    -- AI writing/productivity
    OR name LIKE '%jasper.ai'
    OR name LIKE '%writesonic.com'
    OR name LIKE '%copy.ai'
    -- AI meeting
    OR name LIKE '%otter.ai'
    OR name LIKE '%fireflies.ai'
    OR name LIKE '%krisp.ai'
    -- AI search
    OR name LIKE '%you.com'
    OR name LIKE '%phind.com'
    -- Ollama (if exposed remotely)
    OR name LIKE '%ollama.ai'
    OR name LIKE '%ollama.com'
);

-- AI Scheduled Tasks (Windows)
-- Detects AI tools registered as Windows scheduled tasks
-- Adapted from: scheduled_tasks_suspicious_windows_elastic
-- Catches AI tools auto-starting via Task Scheduler (complements ai_windows_services)
SELECT
    st.name AS task_name,
    st.action AS command_line,
    st.path AS task_path,
    st.enabled,
    st.state AS task_state,
    st.hidden,
    datetime(st.last_run_time, 'unixepoch') AS last_execution,
    datetime(st.next_run_time, 'unixepoch') AS next_execution
FROM scheduled_tasks st
WHERE st.action IS NOT NULL
    AND st.action != ''
    AND (
        -- LLM runtimes
        LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%ollama%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%lmstudio%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%lm studio%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%llama-server%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%llama.cpp%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%gpt4all%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%koboldcpp%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%litellm%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%localai%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%anythingllm%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%open-webui%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%vllm%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%jan.exe%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%msty%'
        -- AI coding tools
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%cursor%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%windsurf%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%codeium%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%tabnine%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%pieces%'
        -- MCP servers
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%mcp-server%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%mcp_server%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%modelcontextprotocol%'
        -- AI image generation
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%comfyui%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%invokeai%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%stable-diffusion%'
        -- Jupyter
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%jupyter%'
        -- Task name matching
        OR LOWER(st.name) LIKE '%ollama%'
        OR LOWER(st.name) LIKE '%lmstudio%'
        OR LOWER(st.name) LIKE '%gpt4all%'
        OR LOWER(st.name) LIKE '%anythingllm%'
        OR LOWER(st.name) LIKE '%litellm%'
        OR LOWER(st.name) LIKE '%comfyui%'
        OR LOWER(st.name) LIKE '%pieces%'
    );

-- AI Tool Configuration Directories (Windows)
-- Detects AI tool config/cache dirs even when tools are not running
-- Closes the Windows gap (macOS and Linux already covered)
-- NOTE: Uses trailing '%' so osquery file table correctly enumerates each directory
SELECT
    path,
    type,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time,
    datetime(atime, 'unixepoch') AS accessed_time
FROM file
WHERE (
    path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.ollama\%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.cache\lm-studio\%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.cache\huggingface\%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.cache\gpt4all\%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.cache\llama.cpp\%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\jan\%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.continue\%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.cursor\%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.codeium\%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.tabnine\%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.claude\%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.config\github-copilot\%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.config\shell_gpt\%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.supermaven\%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.anythingllm\%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.invokeai\%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\LM Studio\%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\AnythingLLM\%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\Ollama\%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\GPT4All\%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Roaming\Jan\%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\Pieces\%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\Cursor\%'
);
